# Fast Piggie — End Game Button Enhancements

**Goal:**
When the End Game button is pressed, save progress, show a summary (current high score vs. personal best), and return the user to the main screen.

**Instructions:**

- Update the End Game button handler in app/games/fast-piggie/index.js.
- Save the current session’s progress.
- Show a summary dialog or screen with the current high score and the player’s personal best (modal recommended).
- Return the user to the main game selection screen.
- Ensure all UI changes are accessible (WCAG 2.2 AA).
- Update or add tests to verify the new End Game behavior.

**Verification:**

- End Game: Confirm progress is saved, a summary is shown (current vs. best score), and user is returned to the main screen.
- All tests pass with 100% function coverage.
